gigapan.description:
A 'Considered Design' where Nike looks at the design and materials of shoes and other products and considers alternate materials which are more sustainable.

"Upper mesh contains 20-25% pre and post consumer recycled PET, Heel counter is printed with zero waste and uses recylcled material, outsole uses 
environmentally preferred rubber and uses Nike Grind."
